title: aolu Common Resources
description: a Data Pack which holds common scoreboards and tags across my other Data Packs
body:
# aolu Common Resources
This datapack holds some stuff which I commonly use across my other datapacks.\
Mainly made this to save me the hasstle of copying stuff over multiple times and for ease of updating commonly used tags\
\
You may also use this pack for yourself if you have need for any of its features

## What the Pack Contains
- Unique ID per Player (all Tamed Pets also share the same ID as their Owner)
- entity_type:ignore: a list non-living entities such as projectiles, vehicles and so-on
